gt_provenance.details: BNN GT is the real channel label idx (repeat over M); not derived from probe outputs. Fano uses seed+1, BNN measurement seed+2 — separated.

score_normalization.details: No metric divided by model's own output stats. p_e_ub_raw stored but p_e_lb_raw/p_e_lb_lcb_raw not persisted (completeness only, not fraud).

result_existence.details: Dense JSON matches log: pool_size=2048, n_inside=10, rho_ub=0.887625, rho_lb=0.937436, floor_epsilon=16.0. Tracker DONE. Coarse JSON has NaN rho_lb (degenerate range, documented).

dead_code.details: union_bhattacharyya + fano_equivocation imported, called in ε loop, fields written to JSON.

scope.details: One model (gemma-2-2b), one pool/seed, uniform prior, L0; 5 coarse + 10 dense ε. Docs mostly explicit + reject universal claims. C2 wording overstated: closest top pairs include rare Unicode/PUA glyphs before the clean case/space twins.

attack_independence.details: KEY CHECK. Bounds path consumes only pool_clip, sigma, codebook distances, Fano's own RNG. BNN obs generated AFTER in _bnn_uniform_error. test_no_observation_argument asserts no obs param (blacklist; exact-whitelist would be stricter but current path is attack-independent).

claims.impact: supported (scoped: uniform-prior L0 one-table); needs_qualifier on C2 morphology wording
